title: Godse
subTitle: Terror and turmoil fill the air when many prominent leaders are held hostage by Godse. This triggers an investigation by a diligent police officer who sets off to probe Godse's motive.

title: A.aa 2
subTitle: A young man with dreams of making it big in the USA falls in love with an NRI woman residing there. She breaks up with him for reasons unknown to him but serendipity plays cupid.

title: Seeru
subTitle: In a shocking turn of events, Manimaran finds himself shielding Malli, the very henchman sent to assassinate him. In the process, Manimaran ignites a fierce rivalry with the corrupt Ashok Mithran.

title: Tagaru Palya
subTitle: After a villager secures a marriage alliance with a city boy for his only daughter, he prepares to offer a sacrifice to the gods. However, things go awry during the ceremony.

title: Eleven
subTitle: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Srinivasa Kalyanam
subTitle: Srinivas, an architect, wants to marry Sridevi, the daughter of a businessman in a traditional ceremony. Conflicts arise when his views on marriage don't align with that of Sridevi's father.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: A Aa
subTitle: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich and strict businesswoman, and Anand, a former chef from a middle-class family, fall in love. However, their background and family feud threatens their romance.

title: Ghar Ki Laxmi
subTitle: A man searches for a bride that would be accepted by his mother and aunts. Things take a turn when he falls for a beautiful woman.

title: Rama Banam
subTitle: Vicky runs away from home after having a disagreement with his brother Rajaram and goes on to become a known gangster. Years later when he returns, the two polar opposite brothers reunite.

title: Mummy
subTitle: A pregnant woman and her six-year-old daughter experience strange occurrences in their mansion. On calling a priest, they learn that an orphan girl's ghost is haunting them.

title: Robinhood
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood thrives on stealing from the rich. However, he reluctantly becomes a bodyguard for a high-profile client due to unforeseen circumstances.

subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.

subTitle: Two brothers, who are polar opposites, have always been at odds with each other since childhood. However, their enmity with a wicked politician unites them.

subTitle: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.
